config.title: Zadania do wykonania #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50101" #include "50203" '------- nx support------- #include "50560"
function fopen() if not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_RAPORT_ZADANIA_DO_WYKONANIA)) then fopen = false exit function end if tasks_fill fopen=true end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------ 'wypełnij tabelke zadania do wykonania '------------------------------------------------------------------------ function tasks_fill() page_.ctrl(CTRID_TASK_CONTAINER).removeall
dim pWykonawca:set pWykonawca=getCurrentWykonawca() if pWykonawca is nothing then exit function end if
dim idWykonawca : idWykonawca=pWykonawca.idobj
dim strWhere if GetCurrentUserID() = trans_.findobjid(10107,"strNazwa='Administrator'") then 'administrator moze przegladac wszystkie zlecenia strWhere = trans_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "((nStatus between N5ZADANIE_ZLECONE and N5ZADANIE_WSTRZYMANE)) or " + _ "(nStatus=N5ZADANIE_ZAKONCZONE) or " +_ "idobj in (select p_idobj from vlist_n5zadanie_zad_listRole where c_zadr_prola in " +_ "(select c_rolaw_prola from vlist_n5wykonawca_wyk_listRole)) or " +_ "idobj in (select p_idobj from vlist_n5zadanie_zad_listRole where c_zadr_prola in " +_ "(select c_rolaw_prola from vlist_n5wykonawca_wyk_listRole)) ") _ (idWykonawca).done() else strWhere = trans_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "((nStatus between N5ZADANIE_ZLECONE and N5ZADANIE_WSTRZYMANE) and pWykonawca=%1) or " + _ "(nStatus=N5ZADANIE_ZAKONCZONE and pZlecajacy=%1) or " +_ "idobj in (select p_idobj from vlist_n5zadanie_zad_listRole where c_zadr_prola in " +_ "(select c_rolaw_prola from vlist_n5wykonawca_wyk_listRole where p_idobj=%1)) or " +_ "idobj in (select p_idobj from vlist_n5zadanie_zad_listRole where c_zadr_prola in " +_ "(select c_rolaw_prola from vlist_n5wykonawca_wyk_listRole where p_idobj=%1)) ") _ (idWykonawca).done() end if dim pM43009 : set pM43009 = doc_.getmodule(43009) page_.addxml CTRID_TASK_CONTAINER, _ pM43009.nx_generate_table_result(nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE) _ .raports.get_raport_by_name("@zadania_do_wykonania@"),800,strWhere,1).getstring() end function
function frefresh() tasks_fill() end function
